title: Corporate authority
doc_html:
§1054. Corporate authority

           A professional chiropractic corporation shall engage in no business other than the practice of chiropractic but may hold property for investment or in connection with its chiropractic practice.

           Added by Acts 1976, No. 686, §1.
doc_text:
§1054.  Corporate authority
A professional chiropractic corporation shall engage in no business
other than the practice of chiropractic but may hold property for investment or
in connection with its chiropractic practice.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 686, §1.
